rules.title: File access routes
rules.description: Rules owned by this plugin instance and projected into AcTrail enforcement.

rule_id.title: Rule ID
rule_id.description: Stable route identity. Leave empty when adding a rule so the plugin can generate it; keep the returned ID unchanged when editing that rule.

decision.title: Decision
decision.description: Allow or deny the matching file operation, or delegate it to a synchronous control plugin with gray.

operation.title: Operation
operation.description: Any applies the route to open, directory creation, and directory removal.

path.title: Path
path.description: Absolute file or directory path matched by this rule. It must be within a writable file-policy scope granted when the plugin was loaded.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: Higher values take precedence when more than one route matches the same path.

gray_target.title: Gray target instance index
gray_target.description: Required only for gray decisions. This is the loaded control-plugin instance index that makes the synchronous decision.
